message:
test: add lifecycle churn tests to swarm stress suite (ft-1memj.30)

5 new tests: rapid create/destroy 100 panes x10 cycles, evict/repush
cycles, mixed operation sequences, two-fleet independence, and snapshot
idempotency. Total: 26 stress tests all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
